orderCards.name: Predator
orderCards.effect: Maul may move up to 2 times before activating.
orderCards.legendAbility: Hatred: Maul heals 1 damage for each enemy model he destroys this activation.

orderCards.name: Cunning Strategist
orderCards.effect: One Minion unit may activate before Maul this turn.
orderCards.legendAbility: Master Manipulator: Move the Victory Tracker forward 1 space.

orderCards.name: Unbridled Rage
orderCards.effect: Maul gains Reckless Attack this activation.
orderCards.legendAbility: Savage: Maul may make an additional attack after his first.

orderCards.name: Shadow of the Sith
orderCards.effect: Maul may deploy from reserve without spending an action.
orderCards.legendAbility: Phantom Menace: Place Maul in base contact with any terrain feature.

orderCards.name: Domination
orderCards.effect: Maul counts as 2 models for objective control this round.
orderCards.legendAbility: Overwhelming Presence: All enemy models within 3 of Maul are Suppressed.

orderCards.name: Dark Patience
orderCards.effect: Maul may spend Force to cancel up to 2 hits this activation.
orderCards.legendAbility: Iron Will: Remove all conditions from Maul.

orderCards.name: The Hunt
orderCards.effect: Minion units may reroll 1 attack die each this turn.
orderCards.legendAbility: Pack Tactics: Each Minion unit that damages an enemy model grants Maul 1 Force.
